name: ashlr
description: Open-source Claude Code plugin — 29 MCP tools (Read/Grep/Edit/MultiEdit/Ask/SQL/Bash/Tree/HTTP/Diff/Logs/Orient/PR+Issue/Glob/WebFetch/DiffSemantic/Ls/EditStructural/Test + genome tools), GitHub OAuth sign-in, auto-genome from public repos, cloud-genome pull on session start, per-session token accounting, animated status line, shareable SVG savings badge. MIT, zero telemetry.
